critique_strutturale_S310: 1. last_event='sent' (NOT 'delivered'): stripe@example.com is RFC reserved test domain, never resolves SMTP. Per founder GUI test (Task D) use real gmail address to confirm end-to-end delivery+inbox+spam folder.

2. License recovery URL embedded in email points to worker TEST env (fluxion-proxy-test.gianlucanewtech.workers.dev). For prod promote (Task E) verify code generates prod worker URL based on ENVIRONMENT var.
3. Custom domain unlocks Resend free tier 100/day 3000/mo. Trigger upgrade Resend Pro $20/mo at >25 vendite/giorno sostenute 7gg (locked S306 Claude.ai research).
4. DMARC p=none currently monitor-only. After 1-2 weeks observing rua reports (fluxion.gestionale@gmail.com), upgrade to p=quarantine for spoofing protection.
